name: Return By Death
description:
A Re:Zero-inspired mod. When you die, you rewind to your last save point (recorded every 5 seconds, configurable) with the inventory you had at that moment. Plays the iconic Return By Death sound on death. Requires Instant Respawn.

v1.1.0 adds: configurable save interval, death counter ('loops'), death log, particle beacon, named save points, configurable sound volume/pitch/broadcast radius, save-point reset, action bar cooldown display.

Inspired by Subaru Natsuki's ability from Re:Zero.
